summary: Comprehensive testing of Interactive Variant Tracker feature. All 10 features tested successfully: Variant Tracker renders with progress bar, missing variants show checkboxes, owned variants show green checks, clicking checkbox opens confirmation AlertDialog, confirming adds variant via POST /api/records, UI updates after add (progress bar, owned section, percentage), toast notification on success, cancel button works, unauthenticated users see 'sign in to add' text with non-interactive checkboxes, backend POST /api/records endpoint works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VariantCompletion component correctly implements the interactive add flow with AlertDialog confirmation
POST /api/records endpoint properly creates record and activity post
UI state management correctly updates owned_count, completion_pct, and variant list after add
Toast notifications (sonner) work correctly including 100% completion celebration
Unauthenticated users see 'sign in to add' text and checkboxes are non-interactive
Minor: Console warnings about DialogContent accessibility (pre-existing, not new)
seed_data_creation: Test record (Picture Disc variant) was added and then deleted to restore test state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Interactive Variant Tracker is fully functional. Test page: /vinyl/tyler-the-creator/igor/mint. Test discogs_id: 14219559. The demo user has 3 IGOR variants (Mint, Red, Standard Black Vinyl). Picture Disc is the missing variant that can be used for testing the add flow. Clicking the checkbox opens an AlertDialog with 'Add to Collection?' title, confirming calls POST /api/records.

features_tested.variant_tracker_renders_with_progress_ba: PASS - Shows owned/total count with progress bar
features_tested.missing_variants_show_checkboxes: PASS - Empty checkbox buttons visible for missing variants
features_tested.owned_variants_show_green_checks: PASS - Green check icons in emerald-colored rows
features_tested.clicking_checkbox_opens_alertdialog: PASS - AlertDialog with 'Add to Collection?' title and Cancel/Add buttons
features_tested.confirming_calls_post_api_records: PASS - Backend successfully creates record with discogs_id, title, artist, color_variant
features_tested.ui_updates_after_adding: PASS - Progress bar updates, variant moves to Owned section, percentage increases
features_tested.toast_notification_on_success: PASS - 'You completed the full variant set!' toast with 🍯 icon
features_tested.variant_tracker_hidden_for_single_varian: NOT TESTED - Test album has 4 variants
features_tested.unauthenticated_users_see_sign_in_text: PASS - Shows 'MISSING (SIGN IN TO ADD)' and Sign In prompt
features_tested.unauthenticated_checkboxes_non_interacti: PASS - Clicking does not open dialog
features_tested.backend_post_records_endpoint: PASS - All 4 backend tests for POST /api/records passed
